headline: Cencora Announces Samantha Hammock as Chief Human Resources Officer
summary: CONSHOHOCKEN, Pa., June 15, 2026--Cencora, Inc. (NYSE: COR) today announced that Silvana Battaglia, Executive Vice President and Chief Human Resources Officer (CHRO), has announced she will retire from the company following a distinguished seven-year tenure. She will be succeeded by Samantha (Sam) Hammock, who will join Cencora as Executive Vice President and CHRO, effective July 13, 2026.
